name: docker run
description: Create and start a new container from a Docker image with specified configuration

options.label: Detached mode
options.description: Run the container in the background and print the container ID

options.label: Interactive TTY
options.description: Keep STDIN open and allocate a pseudo-TTY for interactive use

options.label: Auto-remove
options.description: Automatically remove the container when it exits

options.label: Container name
options.description: Assign a memorable name to the container

options.label: Port mapping
options.description: Map a host port to a container port (e.g., 8080:80)

options.label: Environment variable
options.description: Set an environment variable in the container (e.g., NODE_ENV=production)

options.label: Volume mount
options.description: Mount a host directory or volume into the container (e.g., ./data:/app/data)

options.label: Working directory
options.description: Set the working directory inside the container

options.label: Network
options.description: Connect the container to a specific Docker network

positionalArgs.label: Image
positionalArgs.description: Docker image to create the container from (e.g., nginx:latest)

positionalArgs.label: Command
positionalArgs.description: Command to run inside the container, overriding the default

examples.label: Run an interactive Ubuntu container that auto-removes
Run nginx in the background with port mapping
Run a Node.js app with environment variables
Run with port mapping and volume mounts
Run detached with environment variables and network
Run with custom network and named container
